name: Customer Visit Report
query:
select
CV.company AS  "COMPANY",

CV.employee as "ENGINEER:Link/Employee:120",

CV.employee_name AS "ENGINEER NAME",

CV.name AS "DOCNAME:Link/Customer Visit:150",

CV.date AS "DATE:Date:120",

CV.visit_to AS "VISIT TO",

CV.customer AS "CUSTOMER:Link/Customer:160",

CV.customer_name AS "CUSTOMER NAME",

CV.lead AS "Lead:Link/Lead:160",

CV.lead_name AS "Lead NAME",

CV.contact_person AS "CONTACT PERSON",

DD.document as "OBJECTIVE:Table MultipleSelect/Objective :160",

CV.points_discussed AS "POINTS DISCUSSED",

CV.supports_discussed AS "SUPPORTS EXPECTED",


CV.remarks AS "REMARKS"

from `tabCustomer Visit` as CV 
left outer join `tabObjective Detail` as DD on CV.name=DD.parent 
where CV.company = (case when %(company)s != '' then %(company)s else CV.company end)
and CV.date between %(from_date)s and %(to_date)s 

order by CV.name
